features: WHITE MARK AND STAIN PROTECTION: The NIVEA MEN Black & White Original Anti-Perspirant prevents white marks on black clothing and yellow stains on white clothing with its anti-stain technology
72H SWEAT BLOCK: Experience reliable 72-hour protection against sweat and odours, while caring for your skin with this NIVEA men's deodorant
5x ANTI: This men's deodorant spray is designed to care for both your clothes and skin, providing protection against sweat, odour, stains, residues, and irritation
HOW TO APPLY: Shake well before use. Hold the anti-perspirant spray 15cm from underarms and spray evenly. Allow to dry before getting dressed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin
DERMATOLOGICALLY PROVEN: The anti-perspirant formula is dermatologically tested for skin tolerance and does not contain ethyl alcohol
description: Product Description NIVEA MEN Black & White Original Anti-Perspirant (1 50ml) - Protects against sweat, odour, stains, residues, and irritation Introducing the NIVEA MEN Black & White range ‚Äì your ultimate solution for white mark protection on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing, thanks to our unique patented anti-stains technology. Enjoy reliable 72-hour anti-perspirant protection that effectively combats sweat and odours while caring for your skin. Our dermatologically proven formulas are kind to your skin and free from ethyl alcohol. NIVEA MEN Black & White provides complete protection against sweat, odours, stains, residues, and irritations, all while being gentle on your skin. Trusted in over 160 countries, NIVEA MEN is one of the world's largest and most beloved skincare brands, boasting over 140 years of expertise. As a market leader in the global skincare industry, our researchers are dedicated to delivering high-quality, dermatologically approved products tailored to suit various skin types and needs. Application information : Shake well before use. Hold the anti-perspirant spray 15cm from underarms and spray evenly. Allow to dry before getting dressed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Product benefits White mark protection on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin x5 Anti: Odour, Sweat, Stains, Residues, Irritation DERMA 72H ACTIVE PROTECTION Skin tolerance dermatologically proven No ethyl alcohol 1 x 150ml Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, Cyclomethicone, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isopropyl Palmitate, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Palmitamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, Propylene Glycol, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Linalool, Limonene, Geraniol, Parfum Directions Directions: Shake well before use. Hold can 15 cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Safety Warning Danger: Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50¬∞C. Empty can before recycling. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Keep out of reach of children. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd., Birmingham, B37 7YS. See more
